options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: max_science_pack
options.description: Maximum level of science pack required to complete the game.

options.name: min_tech_cost
options.description: The cheapest a Technology can be in Science Packs.

options.name: max_tech_cost
options.description: The most expensive a Technology can be in Science Packs.

options.name: tech_cost_distribution
options.description:
Random distribution of costs of the Science Packs.
Even: any number between min and max is equally likely.
Low: low costs, near the minimum, are more likely.
Middle: medium costs, near the average, are more likely.
High: high costs, near the maximum, are more likely.

options.name: tech_cost_mix
options.description:
Percent chance that a preceding Science Pack is also required.
Chance is rolled per preceding pack.

options.name: ramping_tech_costs
options.description: Forces the amount of Science Packs required to ramp up with the highest involved Pack. Average is preserved.

options.name: tech_tree_information
options.description:
How much information should be displayed in the tech tree.
None: No indication of what a research unlocks.
Advancement: Indicates if a research unlocks an item that is considered logical advancement, but not who it is for.
Full: Labels with exact names and recipients of unlocked items; all researches are prefilled into the !hint command.

options.name: goal
options.description: Goal required to complete the game.

options.name: craftsanity
options.description:
Choose a number of researches to require crafting a specific item rather than with science packs.
May be increased to add technologies/recipes needed for the first science pack
May be capped based on the total number of locations.

options.name: split_technologies
options.description: Split technologies into individual recipes instead of awarding them as a whole

options.name: progressive
options.description:
Merges together some technologies into progressive items which awards them in order.
Upgrades and are always progressive.

options.name: upgrades_count
options.description: Number of upgrade levels added to the item pool.

options.name: starting_items
options.description: Mapping of Factorio internal item-name to amount granted on start.

options.name: free_samples
options.description: Get free items with your technologies.

options.name: free_samples_quality
options.description:
If free samples are on, determine the quality of the granted items.
Requires the quality mod, which is part of the Space Age DLC. Without it, normal quality is given.

options.name: free_sample_blacklist
options.description: Set of items that should never be granted from Free Samples

options.name: free_sample_whitelist
options.description: Overrides any free sample blacklist present. This may ruin the balance of the mod, be warned.

options.name: world_gen
options.description:
World Generation settings. Overview of options at https://wiki.factorio.com/Map_generator,
with in-depth documentation at https://lua-api.factorio.com/latest/concepts/MapGenSettings.html

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
